panels.title: rebuild onboarding-v2 to Cal AI 8-phase rhythm
panels.scene: Villagers in a circle, doing synchronized interpretive dance in 8 distinct poses. They are crying with joy. The Knight stands in the center, looking slightly bewildered.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: Eight phases of onboarding! It's... it's...perfect!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It's based on another product's flow.

panels.title: strip demo screens to Cal AI brevity
panels.scene: The Knight uses a giant pair of scissors to cut massive scrolls of text into tiny pieces. Villagers collect the scraps like precious relics, sobbing.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: He removed the fluff! Such... focus!

panels.title: cap funnel content width on desktop
panels.scene: A giant phone screen hovers over the village. It's about to crush them, but the Knight quickly shrinks the content inside to fit. The villagers cheer, narrowly avoiding disaster.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: He saved us from the wide screen!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It was overflowing. Now it doesn't.

panels.title: 12 commits. Onboarding refined. Funnel contained.
panels.scene: The Knight sits on a stone bench, polishing his sword with a cloth. A villager is carving his likeness in wood. Another is naming a baby 'Cal'.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: We shall call him Cal, bringer of brevity!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: I just wanted to make it look nice.
